text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Sirius. The fact that I am able to
celebrate this day with you every year fills me
with immeasurable joy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As a token of our enduring friendship, I've
arranged for flowers to be sent to your room.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Right... All hail the Emperor, the master of
flattery and sycophancy.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Come on, you know that's not what I want to
hear from you. So, how about it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, in other words... you wish for us to stand
shoulder to shoulder as both friends and rivals?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Close, but not quite. I want you on edge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How intriguing. So we should fight tooth and
nail—is that it?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Not even close. I'm talking survival of the fittest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How concerning... I had hoped we could bury the
hatchet.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but you actually love it, don't
you—unsheathing your claws and stabbing your
enemies from behind?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch, I'll tear away that goody
two-shoes act of yours in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... So your strength comes from steely
conviction. I, too, must take measures lest I fall
behind.
